generated_oml:
instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring indoor temperature conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring indoor humidity levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
]

]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for detecting room occupancy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]

instance IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorHumiditySensor
]

instance CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IndoorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data collected from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance IndoorHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data collected from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance CO2ConcentrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Carbon dioxide concentration data from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightIntensityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Light intensity measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Room occupancy data collected via sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive BIM model for building geometry, topology, and component relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools
]

instance BIMGeometryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Geometric data of building components from BIM model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMTopologyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Topological relationships of building components from BIM model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, EclipseDitto
]

instance DeviceSpecificData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Device-specific metadata for sensors, actuators, and controllers in BIM model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for creating and managing Building Information Models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity platform for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for synchronization and state management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity interactive visualization engine for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation of building performance under various scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of building operational performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building systems and data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort conditions in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance HealthEffectsOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectsInsight
]

]
